star_1.text: you have to buy good reviews to make your game seem appealing is genuinely pathetic and not surprising. if you want a true review before you download this game, it's another ad packed game that doesn't even let you finish their levels. the gameplay itself isn't even that great, and the levels often repeat maps from previous levels which is another issue. it's not that hard to make a good game and if you had it packed with less ads because you're so money greedy you wouldn't have to buy reviews.

Garbage ad farm, and a poorly made one at that. Boring, can't play offline. Ads. Ads. Ads. If you like ads, then marry this game because that is clearly it's only purpose. The only enjoyable part of this "game" is the sound effects, which aren't worth dealing with the ads. Don't waste your time. Would rate 0 stars if I could, and I'm anticipating a stupid autogenerated response to this feedback. If I could, I would say more about how horrid this game and its developers are. AVOID THIS GAME.

Opened the game for the very first time and it immediately went into an ad, didn't even see the main title for the game. There is an ever present ad on the main screen, as well as a bottom banner ad at all times. It will interrupt levels to show ads, and at the end of the level it will offer an ad for reward, but even if you select no, it will launch into an ad where you get no reward. these ads are all unskipable. The gameplay itself is fine, but the amount of ads is overboard even for this.

There are way too many ads! I get you're trying to make some money, but don't force the ads without some sort of payoff to the player. I was in the middle of a level and got an ad. My 1 will remain until the ads are reduced. I wish I could give it no stars after reading the reviews. At this point, I'm deleting the game. EDIT: I UNDERSTAND YOU NEEDING ADS BUT THERES TOOOOOOO MANY!

I really enjoy the puzzle of getting every tile in every level. It's a ton of fun to play this game. HOWEVER. There is an advertisement in the middle of level starting with level 20! So, you get 2/3 of the way through these fun tricky puzzles and BOOM ADVERTISEMENTS before you get to the finish line! Are you KIDDING ME?! Y'all. I love this game. But holy wow. I might have to Uninstaller due to how much this intrusion offends me. Don't you see it's a race? And you Interrupted the final lap.

I played 10 levels and decided that this game was only made for money. The levels are not challenging at all, take like 10 seconds at most to beat, and there's 3 possible spots for ads between every level. One to get more coins which I never saw a use for, one to get closer to unlocking a character that looks like it took 30 seconds to make in Blender and one mandatory ad in case you didn't let the dev get his cut in the first two. Overall, I found no enjoyment in this game aside from the idea.

So I did my standard airplane mode test, I wanted to see what the game had to offer without the distraction of ads. Lo and behold the game doesn't work without an internet "connexion". I can only hazard a guess that they need that connection to gather data, since the game is not multiplayer nor keeps a global score, the data is what they're really after. In short, don't download this "game", not worth it.

This game SUCKS its horrible the ads are nonstop and long and the creator is money hungry. There is an ad after every round and takes a while to skip. Most of the ads send you to the playstore by tricking you into thinking it's playable and makes you watch ads for basically ANYTHING. If you are looking for a fun game to play, don't install this. Not only to mention it is also VERY low quality.

Don't get this game. Yes its fun, but you will be tortured alive with ad video after ad video after ad video. You'll get just two minutes of gameplay before they have you 'see another sponsor' 🤦‍♂️ And you'll have to sit through at least 5 seconds of each of the vids berore you can skip. My advive for dev, please take away your ads, at least let us play 8 rounds of gameplay before we get an ad.

The game is a basic sort of satisfying like popping bubble wrap, but it's so unchallenging and brainless it just makes me go numb. The first time it forced me to watch an ad I was done. It was sort of okay when there were a bunch of banner ads and offers in-between each level, but after a certain point it'll start pushing ads at you every level. Completely pointless, if it didn't have ads it would be two stars.

Installed the game and it was not good. The controls are jerky and move way too fast. It's like a monkey on crack. Also, you can tell this app has had issues with the in-game purchase option because of all the hoops it makes you jump through. The agreements you have to wade through just to download is nuts! That should persuade you right there to not download and the just walk away. I am guess they had a lot of complaints that the jerky controls were causing people to accidentally buy things!

I literally do not review on here ever. I don't think I have once actually. But o.m.g. Ads, Ads EVERYWHERE. Ads are longer than the levels!! I thought this game would be obsessive and satisfying. Every single level you have to watch at least a 30 second ad. I deleted it after a handful of levels. I couldn't take it. It's also too touchy trying to direct your person. Game sucks. More commercials than TV or a YouTube video.

The game's a good time waster. Or, it would be if not for allllll the ads you have to endure. This company makes simple games that shows multiple levels, but nothing changes. They want you to watch an ad after every 3 second level, and if you say no, you're forced to watch anyway. I've downloaded many games from this developer and I play them for about 3 min, then uninstall due to all the ridiculous ads. They don't care about making good games, just getting ad money. Don't waste your time.

Without a doubt The Most Ads EVER in any game I've played. I don't mind paying for games I like and even watching ads to support the game makers, but this is 3, 4 and up to a 7 ads between levels. I just deleted it after having to endure 7 ads in a row. SEVEN! WTH!?!?! It's beyond crazy to spend more time watching ads than playing the game itself. The game is really fun, and I probably would have paid for it until the ad overload.

We don't need this many ads. I played for a half hour and only got through 10 levels because the ads take longer than playing the game itself. Also, who in their right mind would enjoy being interrupted mid game by an advertisement?? What's up with having to wait 5 years to click the 'x' on the ad also?? And please find new maps. These maps are the same as when I downloaded the game a year ago and played it. I figured it would be updated and a little better by now, but clearly not.

The game is too easy and the Instagram ad looks stupid, but the most time consuming part of the game is the ads in-game. There is an ad banner on the bottom of the screen, one banner that spawns right next to the directions, an ad between levels, and asks if you want to watch an ad to boot your reward progress and watch an ad to actually receive the reward. There is no menu, or level selection. If you mess up on a level, that is it. There's not enough space to describe my anger here.

I finally understand what its like to feel braindead. I saw this game through an ad on Instagram and decided to kill about 10 minutes with it. GOD IS IT BORING! The game is unpolished and unoptimized for even the slowest of phones, gameplay is repetative and slow, and the ads for ingame skins are bothersome. It has the same minimalist moble game style that has become the norm nowadays. I dont even know why i'm writing this anymore. I just want to lower the score a bit.

It seemed like it would be a fun game, and it could be. But the ads are horrible and constant (like every 10 seconds) plus at a certain point the game completely freezes and the graphics glitch to the point where I have to choose it and get back on, which makes me lose all progress. And the creators never get back to complaints, which I expected from a game like this. Uninstalled and not playing again.

Can only expand so far. I hope they are going to come out with an update to fix this. You collect animals that give you gems but I've run out of room for animals. I have a line of animals & no where to put them cause I've maxed out on upgrades. UPDATE: I'm lowering to 1 star & uninstalling because I keep getting a McAfee ad every 30 seconds. I understand ads on a free game but getting 3 or 4 that take you to a website before you finish 1 level is ridiculous.

Shame, the potential was great, but you are hounded from the first level. One advert after every game, 3 if you'd like 👍. Got to level 5, levels we're starting to get more challenging. but the ads had finished me off. unistalled

star_2.text: Ditto pretty much every other review. There is potential in this game, but it hasn't achieved even being described as "tolerable" yet. It's light years away from earning a description of "enjoyable and fun". The incessant ads are a final deal breaker. I'm uninstalling. --- Polish it up devs, and I may re-install and try it again in a few months.

I think the ads are too frequent. You have them after every level and the gameplay isn't worth waiting through them. The levels are very easy, and there is no strategy or puzzle solving to finish them. You have infinite moves and no punishment for death. The difficulty barely increases, however you can always finish levels without restarting, or getting hints, so at least there's that.

The game itself is fun. Like the sound effects and find it a nice calming game to play. The ads and ad quantities are outrageous. Once you play a round you can choose to watch an ad to earn more coins, if not they show you an ad anyways. Take too long deciding where to move during a round? They force you to watch an ad. Pass a round? Watch an ad. Switch characters? Watch an ad. Pass the first part of a level? Watch an ad. I'm serious you will spend more time watching ads than playing.

The game itself is good. The graphics aren't overdone & somehow cute in its simplicity. Very user friendly & puzzles get more difficult as you progress. There are ads after each level is beat, but that's standard with this game type. If that was the entire review it would be a solid 4 star game. But I uninstalled at level 9ish. Midlevel I let my little dude stand still for longer than 3 seconds. An ad played. Unprompted. Even skipping, it was 15 secs. It was the 2nd time def no glitch. Not ok.

way too laggy. it almost crashed my phone and it was just the 2nd level. i like the idea of the game, but it's hard to play when every move threatens to crash my phone. also, the ad right after the level comes in way too quick, especially if there's one everytime you complete a level. considering you can do these levels fastly, it would get annoying quick.

OMG The Ads! Like, I understand that you'll get ads in these games, I even downloaded expecting it. Heck, even an ad after each level (while annoying) would be bearable. BUT this game has an ad not only between *Every Level* but IN THE MIDDLE of half of them. That's way too much, even though the game itself isn't bad it's not worth the ad overload. You can't even enjoy it its so bad.

Just designed for you to spend money. I went ahead and paid to stop the ads. My biggest gripe is that you earn pink gems and use it to build habitats for animals you rescue. I had room for 2 more flamingos, so I rescued one but when I went to my island the flamingo was waiting on a raft instead of being added into the existing habitat where there should have been room. Really frustrating. I'm on level 200 something and they aren't even challenging anymore.
I like the concept, but the levels are way too easy, with ads in between and feels very repetitive.

WAY TOO MANY ADS. Fortunately the game is exactly what it looks like on its own adverts, unlike all the pin-pull puzzle games. The levels get more difficult and there's a side campaign going on; you can also change your avatar and bricks. But every single level ends with an ad. If you want to unlock the prize at the end of the level, watch an ad. If you don't, watch an ad anyway. If you stop playing for 15s, watch an ad. I've just deleted the game because it also fries my graphics and battery.

Its a good time killer game. Not very hard or challenging. At first its easy to build your zoo, but as you defeat more levels and capture more animals, suddenly instead of it costing 50-300 gems to build a bridge or habitat, it costs 5000 gems, yet you can only earn gems slowly through what the animals put out or through watching ads and getting 30 sec extra gems. Earning coins in game are pointless, we should earn or be able to buy gems. There needs to be more ways to earn or buy gems.

The concept of the game is great, theres just too many ads. Get rid of that weird pop-up ad that's at the beginning of the level and maybe have less end of the level ads and you'll find more faithful players. As is theres more ads than game and no one is going to spend their free time watching ads when they can play a different game.
Nice game but ruined with ads. Played until level 2 and had 4 long ads so deleted.

It's literally much harder to fail than to win. Also, idk what you guys are on about. I got an ad every 2 levels, and also, while I was in the menu of like the 4th level, I saw an inappropriate ad. Do NOT let this game go to children's minds.
WEIRD!! A lot of Ads for what you get! it's not really worth it.. It's Kind of B L A W !!
It is very fun to play but it's controls are off, very hard to control

Kinda fun, but the ads are annoying and the model of the guy you play looks cheap. The levels aren't hard either, I only needed to think every so often, and I know I'm not especially good at puzzles. It feels like a game quickly thrown together for ad revenue, especially with a short ad playing after every level and requiring to see a full ad for a costume you earned. A decent brainless time killer regardless, you could worse but far better too.

I love playing the game. Way too many ads and today the ads are all of vulgar, explicit games. The ads were bad enough alone. But now the content of the ads are too much. Also it seems that once you get to a certain point...you can't really advance any further because no more stalls open up. So you have nowhere to put the animals. So what's the point of continuing?

The game is good, but too much advertising, really too much. Each step you need to watch ads and its very annoying. Also in the game you need collect animals and cristals and its limmited space (island) for them, as soon as you fill all islands animals stay in queue, and this part of the game is over. Another bad and annoying thing is that you can't back to the main screen and repeat failed level.

As soon as I first installed and opened the app I literally got showed an ad, I didn't even play the game yet. Within a time frame of 5 minutes 4 ads were shown. Turning on airplane mode to block the ads doesn't work either. They say "Connexion" instead of "Connection" whenever informing you that there's no internet. Really easy to play and honestly boring. Don't play this.

Used for less than 5 mins. Free apps use ads to pay the bills, I get that. But I spent more time in 5 mins stuck watching ads than playing the actual game. Also has an ad on the screen while you play. Just a ridiculous amount of ads. Gave it a shot for 2 levels before the ads made it so unejoyable I immediately uninstalled.

star_3.text: Ads after every level, skippable after a few seconds, but every. Single. Level. Might as well click the reward option if an ad is going to show anyway. This game is relatively simple and its quick to clear levels, so you will honestly spend more time watching ads than playing the actual game. I do enjoy playing it though, which is why I give it three stars.

Very cute game, fun, well animated, and the ads for it are accurate: You swipe to collect tiles, unlocking cute animals along the way. But the ads inside the game are *relentless.* Literally an ad after every single level. They didn't even wait for you to get up to the level 5 to 10 range like most other games do, either. Ads start at level 1 and *do not* stop.

I really liked the game at first. Around level 300, in the zoo area, the water area and the bird area just up and disappeared. No more teleporter, no more helper guys, just the sand area which is all glitchy now too. Won't let me feed the animals most of the time, just walk around them and collect the little amount of diamonds there are. Even the food market changed. Can only buy 1 of each item now. So disappointed. Every time I reinstall, it's somehow different in the zoo area

Meh...it's a time waster for when you want to zone out. Lots of ads but that's expected of these types of games, however it went into "too many ads" territory for my tastes. I've played better games that are similar to this that would occasionally give you a challenge. I didn't play too many levels of this before I decided to uninstall, but while there were some interesting feature (auto-bump corners and auto-arrows), it was kinda repetitive.

Really fun app. Slows down and lags a bit if you play too many levels in a row. I just close and reopen the app and that seems to fix it. Would be 4 or even 5 stars if the ads were after ever 5th (or even 3rd) level or so instead of after EVERY level. With levels being so short, I sometimes feel like I'm spending as much time watching ads as I am playing the game. Decrease the ad frequency a bit and it will definitely be a 5 star app that I would sink a lot more time into.

It's a fun, mindless game with some level of skill needed. The ads are usually short between levels (5 sec) and sometimes I can get 3 or 4 levels in without ad. The only thing that I'm getting bored with is I'm almost on level 500 and for the past 200+ levels it repeats levels that I've done over and over and over again. It doesn't get any harder either. I'm totally bored now.

Gameplay is repetitive. Forced ads. When someone says lose it, because they don't want to watch an ad for what you're offering, and you then force them to watch the ad for no reward anyways, it's a slap in the face. When will developers learn that if they offer something of quality for an ad, people will gladly keep watching them. Uninstalled.

It's a good game to pass the time. I'm not a fan of an ad for every video but it's a free game and you can buy the ads to turn off if they bother you enough. The only reason to get currency is to get skins for your character that rides the tiles(which seems unnecessary but it's their choice to design it that way), or for a world skin, which are kinda worth it, they're cozy. But, I wish there were some kind of power ups you could buy (stop in place, teleport to certain tile?). It's decent.

Currently at level 450 after less than a week of playing. Levels get pretty repetitive pretty quickly. The game is fun other than that. I do not like how many ads there are and having long ads between levels. It interrupts the flow. I do really like the zoo feature, but I do not like how you can only get a certain amount of animals and then the animals start to pile up with no way to get rid of them. And after upgrading the habitats, which doesn't take that long, gems are useless.

It's a cute game but has flaws. The farther you get in levels, the glitcher it gets. Several times it has frozen and crashed. It's also not necessary to start every level with instructions in how to move the character. After the first level it's not necessary ever again. It makes the game play slow to start since it's trying to give instruction when you don't need it. I do like it tho. It's a cute simple puzzle game, nice for passing the time.

I enjoy playing this game! It's a puzzle and I like the sound effects and graphics; HOWEVER, it would be cool if the stages were longer. I understand the need for ads but there are too many & ordinarily I would purchase the no ads option but the last time I purchased the "No Ads" option, I still continued to have ads. I reached out to the customer service provided & they never returned my email nor did they return my money so I lost that money😬. Now I am apprehensive regarding purchasing...

Its cute but needs some improvement. The ads, oh there are so many ads. I understand this is a form of revenue but tone it down some. I would purchase ad free, but the game is not a good enough game to pay what they want. The graphics are really thrown together and not great to be asking such a premium price for ad free. The graphics could use alot of work. It is a cute game, I will keep it installed for when im bored until someone copies it with better graphics and less ads.

Great game. Only downside are the ads coming up while playing. I don't mind ads in between levels, they help us players get free games, but during gameplay is not cool. Ads were popping up while I was swiping which would then redirect me to some random site. Once the ad timing is sorted, I'll be keen to try again.

Fun game. I actually really like it. It just maxes out too quickly. The rewards max out and then... It isn't as fun after- no real goal or challenge. The ads are ridiculous- having to click four Xs to close one ad is too much. But, I won't pay to remove them for a game I uninstalled after a few days. (Reinstalled to start over and show my kid because I really do like it.)

It's fun to play, the ads aren't, aggressive and you can play offline. Unfortunately your progress doesn't save if you get a new phone so I have to start from level 1. I had unlocked almost every avatar and block shape and ever progressed quite far with the Zoo collection inside. I wouldn't recommend paying actual money because of that but you can try watching ads to earn more coins instead.

Fun game, the ads were a little aggressive some were up to 30 second unskippable ones and I could go max of two levels before one would pop up. I learned that closing and relaunching the game was the fastest way through them the majority of the time. Good enough game to pass the time but not good enough without paying.

Tooooooo many ads. The tile mazes are too small, the amount of time playing compared to ads is 90% ads 1% play time. It would be a cool game otherwise. The ZOO is limited and makes the game end with no end if that makes sense. Someone dropped the pooper scooper if ya get my meaning lol expand the zoo. Make larger cages and more animals. Why pay money for a game you can beat all levels on a few days?

Not a bad app, it had a lot of ads, one after every level. It's a simple game but some levels get tricky with the white bumpers. If you're bored this might be a good game for a boredom buster, and I think it's offline so you can play it anywhere anytime.

It's a fun little time waster but it gets old quick. [On a side note]... I don't mind watching ads(especially reward ads),I get why they have to show them,people need to quit complaining about ads and be a little more patient. The game itself, well basically... You can unlock characters & collect gold coins in very repetitive levels. I played for a few hours, that's about all I can put up with!! 3/5

Update: avg. 45 seconds/level to avg 15 seconds/ads after each level. The intrusive interrupting ads have stopped and they've also added a little pet collection system which is nice. Nothing new noticed upon retry. Still too many ads for the low simulation IMO _-----After the first 5 levels is when you'll get an ad after every level. Of course they try to have you review it before level 5. Could be a great game but as of now it becomes mundane and uninteresting as the levels seem to be the same.

star_4.text: EDIT: I like this game and even paid for ad-free. Over time I noticed that the maze patterns repeat and original mazes run out so no matter how far you get, it never becomes more challenging. I have maxed out all of the zoo habitats and collected all of the animals that will fit. I thought that once it maxed them out, perhaps new habitats may become available on a new level. Nope. Then I thought maybe when I get to level 500. Nope. It's a dead end. I feel cheated.
please update the game and add more islands for the animals. I'd play more but I'm completely out of space!!!

Awesome. 11 levels 2 ads. I recommend it as a little game to play in your spare time. Fun, gets you thinking and always exciting. I deleted a few months ago because of storage space but I downloaded it again today and it has improved a lot!!!! Only thing I have to say is that it is a great game just not a game that you would play 24/7 you like it so much. But I do love it and hope you do too.

Good way to pass the time. The ads can be annoying but it's how the developers are able to offer the game for free. They give the option to buy ad free play. I wish they'd offer the rare animals more than just every 10 levels and I'm hoping they expand the zoo. If they update the game with zoo expansion and more rare animals, I'd definitely give this a 5 ⭐ review

The game is programmed well. Controls are a bit sensitive, but work well. The puzzles are not very difficult, and it is a long time between new elements being added to the puzzles. Even the new elements don't really increase difficulty. I have yet to see the bonus stages, because the button to go into the stage does nothing. Likewise, the button to accept a new skin does nothing. Both buttons are supposed to launch an ad to grant access, but the ad never launches, so nothing happens.

If you get an ad, it's to get more diamonds and you have to press the ad button. In between games you don't get ads (unless you want to double your points then you press ad button) I love this game haven't had an issue till now. I'm on level 9112 and it's frozen. I see it on the screen but it doesn't let me move my character. 😩 HELP OTHER THAN THAT THIS GAME IA GOOD AND NO RANDOM ADS POP UP TO CONTINUE PLAYING!

This game is addicting. I really enjoy playing it The only issue is that it is a little hard to maneuver, so it can get frustrating. I am also disgusted that the ads cut you off in the middle of play. This is a definite uninstall for me. Ads should be appropriately timed after play. Nothing more kills an enjoyable game quicker than an ad!! Bye until you address this issue

This game is very entertaining I wouldn't say addictive I'm not sure if it's intentions is supposed to frustrate you, but it does and there's a lot of ads that pop up even in the middle of the game which is a secondary frustration. But all in all the game is enjoyable It challenges you, but Again it also frustrates you but it does challenge you!

Well designed, satisfying, not that hard. Game does a good job introducing you to the core concept and expands on it in interesting ways in later levels. I had a lot of fun challenging myself to get every tile though this isn't necessarily required. Definitely enjoyable for all ages. Took one star off because you're required to stay online solely so that it can feed you ads between every level.

Pretty fun overall. Just a tip for everyone on how to disable the ads for free. There is this other app called personalDNSfilter that allows you to disable the ads and you don't even have to turn off your wifi. You just open the app and it should work right away. It should work with every app so I recommend using it while playing these games that are littered with ads.

I think its a pretty fun game! But after a while... it gets kinda repetitive and boring. Its technically the same thing although it gets quite challenging as you move on to new levels. I would say that probably the majority would install this and then a few days later, they would delete it. But, some people would keep it. You never know.

Will I ever be able to make more islands for my animals? I've maxed out just about every island and don't know if I'll continue if I can't add more islands. Otherwise I really enjoy the game, the ads aren't that bad, if you get one mid game you took too long to slide around, go faster lol

I do love this game, it is a very creative one too! But, the reason I'm giving it a 4 star is because it is quite repetitive. Are you able to make them just a tad bit harder? That was barely the reason, but the other reason which makes it a 4 star is because of the...ads. I have only been playing for I dont know, 10 minutes? And I've already gotten like 5 ads, maybe even 6! But, overall, this is a brilliant and creative game and I love it. I hope you can improve these problems. Thank you!

Pretty okay game. For some unlockables you have to watch an ad, but that's not too bad considering that there's barely any ads otherwise. The levels aren't that difficult and get somewhat repetitive, but it's still a fun game to zone out and play. It reminds me of a fidget toy, something to just fiddle with.

The game is amazing! I wish when you move your character that it doesn't go as fast because then I can't see what it does. I absolutely love how there is like a little farm sort of thing! You collect animals and they have their little buddies to snuggle with. Overall 4/5.

Actually not too bad. I installed this game one morning because I was really bored, and I noticed some of the reviews said that there was a ridiculous amount of adverts, but I didn't get a single one. I've uninstalled the game now purely because it got really boring, as the levels don't get any harder. Everything is the same. Other than that, not bad. A simple easy game :)

Well I wouldn't say it is smooth but at least it is fun to play not many times I had to stop and realize that I made a mistake by trying to get clear and get all of them but although it is fun you can unlock new kids of thing to stack like I have a butterfly as it but you can also get coins but yeah it is fine not much to say about it but play it

The ads have been covered by others, and I agree. I would like to focus on the game. The zoo is fun, but the diamond expense is ridiculous. I should at least be able to use my coins to buy diamonds to get all those animals off the rafts.
Controls are much better. Ads are frequent, but it's worth it.

Oddly satisfying. It's a fun time killer game, for sure. I like the addition of the animals you can collect and upgrade. Also, a little tip***Ads only seem to pop up when idle for 5 seconds or more. As long as you keep moving, ads won't pop up near as often.

star_5.text: Stacky Dash is a simple yet highly addictive hyper-casual game. The gameplay is so smooth that once you start, it’s hard to stop without completing the level. You collect tiles while running through maze-like paths, and each level feels more fun and interesting than the last. The controls are easy, the graphics are clean, and the best part — the game is enjoyable and relaxing for all age groups. It’s a perfect option for quick time pass! Overall, Stacky Dash is a light, satisfying, and mood-ref
love the game, but got a new phone and lost all progress. Happy to get a prompt response about my issue, that in itself deserves a better rating.
I haven't played this it always makes me to pick up the tiles each to every level of it so that way you don't have to do it all over again

Finally found one I really like. Gameplay isn't interrupted by ads which is a biggy, I immediately uninstall games that do that. I used to be irritated that they start off every game by reminding you how to play (swipe to move) because it's so unnecessary, but after a hundred some levels it's just kinda funny. Thanks for the reminder, just in case I develop a brain tumor sometime after level 200 and forget how to play. How do you play this again? You swipe? Woah! 🤯 lol

The ads made me curious. The recent negative reviews made me cautious. But the game is literally an idle puzzle and it keeps getting more challenging as I go. I passed 15 levels before making this review and the ads in the game don't bother me as it gives a break and kind of disorients me to make it more challenging. Some of the ads are interesting and they aren't super repetitive either. I'm always up for a good puzzle and this game seems to be calming over intense at least in the beginning.

This is the first game in a long time that is actually what is advertised. It is fun, relaxing, challenging enough to keep you interested in yet simple enough to get past the levels. Yes, there's adds, deal with it. Adds do not interfere with game play. No daily challenges or events, but decent game.

Lots of commercials but that is also how I saw it as a game to begin with. Still early, but if it is like most other games, what you see will not be what you get (I want to do the challenges that are usually shown in the ads but that often is not what I will ever see even after 400 levels passed-another ad game hasn't gotten to it so I expect the same here).

Fun game! No time limits. No waiting for lives to recharge. Nothing to buy. The ads in between levels are very short. The only ads you have to watch through are if you want to play for extra coins but since there is nothing to buy, extra coins are unnecessary. Well, I take that back, you can buy extra skins for your player but you earn more than enough coins without watching ads that I've already bought them all by level 100. It's just a nice, relaxing game to zone out on.

At first it was just a cute game that for some reason collected animals at the end of tasks. It took me way too long to realize you're supposed to give them habitats and feed them. I don't know why but that made me love it even more. Though they should probably explain that at the beginning. Every level I get the same instruction on how to move my character but never hey build them an island to live on.

Rating edit: I loved this game at first. Simple concept, simple but cute graphics but the ads in the middle of the game were too much. Not sure what happened, but that has stopped for the most part. Now it only shows ads in between levels or if you wait to move your guy for about 10 secs. (Before it was about 1.5 secs, which wasn't long enough for your eyes to adjust to solve the problem. Now its great. Old review: Love the Game but it just stops in the middle of play for an ad. Ridiculous.

This game is amazing people keep complaining on how there are a bunch of ads but I've only gotten 2 and then one that I clicked on to play a bonus round. The levels are quite the same but there are small differences as you continue through the game. Overall this game is amazing I really recommend this game to anyone who needs a game to relive stress or something to play when waiting.

Exactly as advertised. There are even enough little extra features to keep it interesting, too. There are quite a few ads, but you can pay to turn them off, and it's worth sitting through them to play a game that's not an endless series of impossible-to-complete levels that are trying to trap you into buying boosts. I'm really enjoying this app!

I like this game it is not too difficult therefore fun to just pass the time, I like the island where you can build habitats that's a nice touch. There are little challenges every now and then. Overall it is a great way to pass the time I haven't encountered too many ads and no glitches except once when the screen went black and I had to start over but no big deal

new review : good game now , can finally play as the funny anime girl , nice to see you righted your wrongs . will keep this game on my phone for the foreseeable future . original review (for archival purposes) : not at all what was advertised , doesnt even have the characters shown . let me play as the funny anime girl in the fifth image , literally the only reason i got this game ... uninstalling

Very addictive BUT the game got stuck at the 3rd stage of level 480..it wouldn't move.. I tried over a dozen times and.. As luck would have it i changed characters and slowly it let me move on a couple of steps over a few goes... Now on level. 514.. Would like to know how the game progresses from here.. I have loads of animals waiting in queue

I kept seeing the adds, which were intriguing. I like puzzles, and working out these patterns to get the highest scores is (to me, at least) both relaxing, and rewarding. I also like that though you CAN go for the higher amounts of coins, etc., you always have the option to just keep plugging along. Thank you! :-)

This app is Alright, But These are the reasons that i give it it a three stars. First, When I do level two it always glitches then the block noise was high pitched block noise. and it took forever to make the pitched noise off. Second, This time i was playing on my apple ipad, it didnt glitched, but after a stage, and a stage it had ads when stage to stage. But I know i worked hard and i will just rate it a 5 but, please fix the issues but hope you are safe! wash ur hands and wear ur masks! ♡︎

This seems to be a rewarding, and relaxing game to play. I hvnt been playing very long. But, so far so good. This game has just enough puzzle solving challenges, that I dnt find it frustrating, at all, to play each level. Unlike some others can be. I deff like it. 😉 Happy Gaming Folks!

I don't know why people have rated this game a total of 3.8 when it's an amazing game!! Like a literal 5 star! And I downloaded this game some time ago today, and I have only gotten 1 ad so FAR!!!!!! Like if people have problem with ad's (cause I don't, since this game doesn't contain a lot of ad's) they can just simply switch off their wifi or internet in their phone!! SIMPLE!

I'm not sure why people are hating on this app. It's a simple game, it's not something you are going to play all day long but it is fun. And it's free. That means there are some ads, but its not crazy. There are short 5 second ads before each level and you can watch a longer ad to get a new skin. Because it's a simple game most of the levels aren't very difficult, but after looking at game play I don't know what people expect. I personally like it.
